inputs.label: Weight in stones
inputs.businessContext: Enter the weight in stones to be converted to kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the weight in stones to be converted to kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilograma dönüştürülecek stone cinsinden ağırlığı girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie das Gewicht in Stone ein, das in Kilogramm umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le poids en stones à convertir en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el peso en stones para convertir a kilogramos.

inputs.label: Additional pounds
inputs.businessContext: Enter any additional pounds (0–13). 1 stone = 14 pounds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter any additional pounds (0–13). 1 stone = 14 pounds.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie zusätzliche Pfund ein (0–13). 1 Stone = 14 Pfund.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez les livres supplémentaires (0–13). 1 stone = 14 livres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese cualquier libra adicional (0–13). 1 stone = 14 libras.

inputs.label: Conversion factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor: 1 stone = 6.35029 kg. Adjust if local standards require a different factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor: 1 stone = 6.35029 kg. Adjust if local standards require a different factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm faktörü: 1 stone = 6,35029 kg. Yerel standartlar farklı bir faktör gerektiriyorsa ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor: 1 Stone = 6,35029 kg. Passen Sie ihn an, falls lokale Standards einen anderen Faktor erfordern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard : 1 stone = 6,35029 kg. Ajustez si les normes locales exigent un facteur différent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar: 1 stone = 6.35029 kg. Ajuste si los estándares locales requieren un factor diferente.

inputs.label: Decimal places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogram çıktısı için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado en kilogramos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
